summary: Completed comprehensive testing of VenuLoQ Phase 13 — Settlement Backend Wiring + Team Portal Navigation Consolidation. Backend: 23/23 tests passed. Frontend: All UI features verified including Settlement Dashboard, Settlement Detail with 4 tabs (Overview, Collection, Payables, Closure), handoff workflow, and Team Portal sidebar/quick actions for RM role.

issues: Console warning: 'In HTML, <span> cannot be a child of <option>' - React hydration warning from dynamic option rendering, does not affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: settlement.py: Well-structured 569-line backend with clear settlement workflow model
settlement.py: Dashboard route correctly placed BEFORE /{lead_id} routes to avoid path parameter conflicts
settlement.py: Uses leads collection as single source of truth with settlement field

settlement.py: 8 settlement statuses: closure_ready → settlement_pending → collection_verification_pending → payable_commitments_pending → settlement_under_review → settlement_ready → settlement_blocked → financial_closure_completed
settlement.py: 5 financial closure checks required for completion
settlement.py: Handoff generates settlement package from closure_ready event with booking snapshot, addenda, incidents
SettlementDashboard.js: Clean 243-line component with summary strip, filters, and settlement cards
SettlementDetail.js: Comprehensive 718-line component with 4 tabs and all settlement management features
DashboardLayout.js: RM sidebar correctly includes Settlement link with IndianRupee icon
TeamWelcome.js: RM quick actions correctly includes Settlement
RMDashboard.js: Header includes settlement icon button linking to /team/rm/settlement
TeamApp.js: Settlement routes correctly wired at /team/rm/settlement and /team/rm/settlement/:leadId

test_credentials.rm: rm1@venuloq.in / rm123 (role: rm - can manage own cases, sees 0 settlement cases if none closure_ready)
test_credentials.admin: admin@venuloq.in / admin123 (role: admin - can access all cases, sees 2 settlement cases)

seed_data_creation: Used existing test leads from Phase 11/12 testing. Admin can see 2 settlement cases: 'Phase11 Test Wedding' (closure_ready → settlement_pending after handoff) and 'Demo Payment Customer' (settlement_pending).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 13 Settlement Backend Wiring + Team Portal Navigation fully tested. Backend endpoints at /api/settlement/* all working. Frontend routes at /team/rm/settlement (SettlementDashboard) and /team/rm/settlement/:leadId (SettlementDetail). 8-status settlement model: closure_ready → settlement_pending → collection_verification_pending → payable_commitments_pending → settlement_under_review → settlement_ready → settlement_blocked → financial_closure_completed. Collection statuses: pending, partial, received, verification_pending, verified. Payable completeness: complete, partial, missing_data. Payout readiness: payout_ready, payout_not_ready, payout_readiness_unclear, payout_blocked_by_dispute_or_hold, payout_readiness_pending_verification. 5 financial closure checks: event_closure_complete, collection_verified, payable_commitments_captured, blockers_resolved, settlement_note_complete. Test lead lead_4f7a8e81c605 has settlement_pending status after handoff initiation.

real_apis: All settlement endpoints are real (no mocking)
